word: H8370 - שְׁתַר בֹּוזְנַי - Shᵉthar Bôwzᵉnay - sheth-ar' bo-zen-ah'-ee - Shetharboznai

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁתר בּוזני

Transliteration: shethar bôzenay

Phonetic: sheth-ar' bo-zen-ah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Shethar-boznai = "star of splendour"
  1. a Persian officer in the reign of Darius

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
